name: hud_ui_fill_bitmap_constructor
description: HudUiFillBitmap::Constructor calls the ZRD widget base constructor, installs the fill-bitmap ftable, clears the fill and preview image/rect state, and preserves the offset fields.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows HudUiZrdWidget::Constructor, ftable install to g_HudUiFillBitmap_FTable, and stores to offsets 0x14c, 0x150, 0x154, 0x158, 0x15c, 0x160, 0x16c, 0x170, 0x174, 0x178, and 0x17c.
The native smoke validates the fill-bitmap ftable, zeroed normalized/image/rect fields, and preserved fill/preview offset fields.
